results.title: What is Arogya? - Definition from Yogapedia
results.content:
Search Icon
Search Icon

# Arogya

## What Does Arogya Mean?

Arogya is a Sanskrit word that means "overall well-being" and "health of mind, body and spirit." Generally speaking, it means living a healthy life without disease and having complete health in mind and body.

Arogya can be used to refer to a wide range of topics, including yoga asana, Ayurveda, meditation, pranayama, japa mantra and much more.

## Yogapedia Explains Arogya

For many, the idea of leading a healthier life is one of the main reasons for beginning to practice yoga. The combination of the physical and spiritual side of this ancient form of exercise makes it ideal for anyone looking to gain a lifestyle that gives them an overall healthier way of living. [...] X
Yogapedia Logo

Sthira bhaga is a Sanskrit term that describes the advanced series of Ashtanga yoga. Sthira translates as “strong,” “stable,” “steady” and “resolute” while bhaga means “prosperity,” “good fortune” and “happiness.” The term is often translated as “strength and grace,”… View

# Arogya [...] Arogya is also the name of a nonprofit, global health organization that works to prevent non-communicable diseases.

In addition, Arogya is a common boy's name in the Indian subcontinent, and may be used in a toast to wish someone happiness and good health.

## During These Times of Stress and Uncertainty Your Doshas May Be Unbalanced.

To help you bring attention to your doshas and to identify what your predominant dosha is, we created the following quiz.

Try not to stress over every question, but simply answer based off your intuition. After all, you know yourself better than anyone else.

results.title: Testimonials & Patient Reviews | Arogya Holistic Healing
results.content:
A calming, tranquil tea shop/wellness store that exudes health and wellness the second you step into the store. Arogya is run by the warmest, most educated, and health conscious team of people who are truly interested in the well being of anyone who walks in their door.

Wei and Gregor, and anyone who has ever worked there, are the nicest, most genuine people you will ever meet.

– Dawny, Facebook

#### “I received some of the best and most effective acupuncture treatments in my life” [...] This is a wonderful place with wonderful people. They helped me with a health issue no one else could.

– Sandra, Facebook

#### “I was so much better moments after my treatment.”

I was so sick with an upper respiratory infection and no matter what medication I took ... I couldn't Shake it. I'm not the type to go to a place like this for help ... But I was just so sick I was willing to do anything. SO GLAD I DID! I was so much better moments after my treatment. Not only did the infection clear up ... I felt somehow healthier. I recommend giving this place a try ... You feel a certain healthy energy the second you walk in the door.

– Lucia, Facebook

#### “Arogya is run by the warmest, most educated, and health conscious team of people” [...] After moving to the east coast, I was lucky to find Arogya Holistic Healing right here in Connecticut near to my new home. For almost two years, I have seen Gregor Bertram when I am in need of acupuncture; he is an excellent practitioner and so very knowledgeable. Arogya has become my trusted resource for health and wellness!

– Gabriela, Yelp

#### “I highly recommend this place it’s worth the money trust me!”

I highly love this place. I love their teas and the massages they do, I’m actually on the 1 month weight loss program, its day 4 and I can feel my body different, my cravings are gone and much more things I’m feeling. I highly recommend this place it’s worth the money trust me!!!!!

– Yadira, Google

#### “They helped me with a health issue no one else could.”

# Arogya Diet Plan Overview

1. The document discusses various principles of Ayurveda related to diet, exercise, sleep, massage, and mental well-being.
2. Key recommendations include eating a balanced diet in proper quantities, exercising regularly, getting adequate sleep, practicing yoga, and reducing stress through meditation and herbal remedies.
3. Maintaining physical, mental, and spiritual health involves following Ayurvedic principles of diet, lifestyle, and use of herbs tailored to the individual and season.

results.title: The Benefits of the Sutra of Golden Light | Lama Yeshe Wisdom Archive
results.content:
The benefits of reading this sutra are immeasurable. Reciting just a few lines of the Sutra of Golden Light creates more merit than making immeasurable offerings to the Buddha. Reciting this Sutra directs one's life towards enlightenment. There is so much merit. One's life becomes so easy—whatever one wishes for one receives. There is unbelievable purification. One liberates numberless sentient beings from the oceans of samsaric suffering and brings them to enlightenment. 1

In the Sutra of Golden Light, the Tathagata says:

This King of Glorious Sutras  
Fully destroys external enemies,  
Turns back legions of foreign armies,  
Removes the fear of the terrified and poor,  
And causes supreme virtue.

It also has the following benefits: [...] It also has the following benefits:

The protectors, the guardians, will definitely provide protection. Whenever they are needed, they will arrive. Acts of terrorism will be averted. Acts of violence will stop. Natural catastrophes will be avoided. Crops will be successful. The environment will be clean. People will be safe. If there is war, it will end and there will be peace.

If you recite the Sutra of Golden Light, you will have good health, energy and power. All material needs will be satisfied. One will be listened to and respected by others. Whenever a question arises, the guru will answer. One will purify eons of negative karma, meet perfect teachers, develop realizations and definitely benefit others.

The Sutra of Golden Light is the car that will take you to enlightenment. [...] This also protects individuals and the country from what are labeled natural disasters of the wind element, fire element, earth element, and water element, such as earthquakes, floods, cyclones, fires, tornadoes, etc. They are not natural because they come from causes and conditions that make dangers happen. They come from people’s past inner negative thoughts and actions, and from external conditions.

results.title: Benefits - FPMT
results.content: The holy Golden Light Sutra is the king of the sutras. It is extremely powerful and fulfills all one's wishes, as well as bringing peace and happiness for all
